source_pr.title: planner, executor: indexMerge support partition table with limit embedded
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #43158, close #43160, ref #41028

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
```
use real tikv env to run executor_test.TestOrderByWithLimit and passed.
```
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: queryCommonHash := fmt.Sprintf("select /*+ use_index_merge(tcommonhash, primary, idx_bc) */ * from tcommonhash where a = %v or b = %v order by c limit %v", a, b, limit) (executor/index_merge_reader_test.go)
failure_signature: queryCommonHash := fmt.Sprintf("select /*+ use_index_merge(tcommonhash, primary, idx_bc) */ * from tcommonhash where a = %v or b = %v order by c limit %v", a, b, limit) (executor/index_merge_reader_test.go)
fix_pattern: queryCommonHash := fmt.Sprintf("select /*+ use_index_merge(tcommonhash, primary, idx_bc) */ * from tcommonhash where a = %v or b = %v order by c limit %v", a, b, limit) (executor/index_merge_reader_test.go)

evidence: evidence: queryCommonHash := fmt.Sprintf("select /*+ use_index_merge(tcommonhash, primary, idx_bc) */ * from tcommonhash where a = %v or b = %v order by c limit %v", a, b, limit) (executor/index_merge_reader_test.go)

files: distsql/select_result.go, executor/distsql.go, executor/index_merge_reader.go, executor/index_merge_reader_test.go, executor/partition_table_test.go, executor/table_reader.go, planner/core/casetest/testdata/plan_suite_out.json, planner/core/handle_cols.go, planner/core/task.go
